sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84704" key="polughri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-γηρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n84704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">attainment of great age,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Melamp.</author> </bibl> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">παλμ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1365.tlg002:p.24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.24</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> <sense n="D" id="n84704.1" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ´-γηρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-γήραος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:62:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
